analysis_method: librosa 0.11.0 — beat_track for BPM, Krumhansl-Schmuckler chroma correlation for key. Auto-detection ±10% possible — user can override.

01-tabasco.title: TABASCO
01-tabasco.groove_axis_suggestion: punk / driving rock — straight 4-on-floor, kick on 1+3, snare on 2+4, busy 8th hat

02-hey.title: Hey
02-hey.groove_axis_suggestion: mid-tempo pop-rock — kick 1+3, snare 2+4, half-open hi-hat, occasional fills

03-i-got-a-feeling.title: I got a feeling
03-i-got-a-feeling.groove_axis_suggestion: rock pocket — laid-back snare, room reverb, deeper kick

04-under-the-moon.title: Under the Moon
04-under-the-moon.groove_axis_suggestion: fast — could be ska/punk (161 is double-time read of ~81 reggae feel) — need ear check on whether half-time or full-time

05-electric-sheep.title: Electric Sheep
05-electric-sheep.groove_axis_suggestion: punk / agro rock — high ZCR (0.21) suggests busy cymbal + distorted guitar, dense bright mix

06-human-fly.title: Human Fly
06-human-fly.groove_axis_suggestion: heavy rock / blues-rock — highest RMS (0.154), warmest centroid (2332), Cramps-ish?

07-sister.title: Sister
07-sister.groove_axis_suggestion: ballad / slow groove — low ZCR (0.076) = sustained / legato, warmer centroid (1873)
07-sister.structure_notes: TBD — closer track, contrast to set energy

set_summary.set_arc: TABASCO (short opener high) → Hey (mid-high) → I got a feeling (mid long) → Under the Moon (fast peak?) → Electric Sheep (high agro) → Human Fly (heavy) → Sister (ballad closer)

next_steps: User listens to each track and confirms/corrects bpm + key + groove_axis
User transcribes lyrics + chord progressions (lyrics_status → done)
Generate drum-frames-tabasco-{NN}.json in drum-floor repo for each song
Build band-room.html: drum-floor playback + click + lyric display + optional original audio backing
Optional Phase 4: Demucs stem separation → drum replacement
